notes: 767-site re-extraction (snapshot 20260624T095651). ai_value = raw_integer * 0.0001 per CGIAR v3.1. Ocean pixels (raw value 0) treated as NA; recovered via buffer/nearest-land fallback. unep_class_5: canonical UNEP 5-class (thresholds 0.05/0.20/0.50/0.65). unep_class_7: 5-class + FAO humid subdivisions at 1.0 and 2.0. Replaces prior version (which had single unep_class column).
